title: Experience Plus
description: A simple mod that improves EXP.
body:
This mod adds an easy way to share and store experience points.
Items include:
- EXP. Nugget
- L. EXP. Nugget
- Lapis Lazuli Chalice

Right click the chalice to extract a nugget. If you have lapis in your off-hand, it repairs the chalice.

XP nugget textures are from the **Create mod.**
**JEI reccomended!**
